headline: The Teenager Who Started the Largest Ocean Cleanup in History
summary: Boyan Slat was 16 when he went diving and saw more plastic than fish. Instead of despairing, he designed a passive ocean cleaning system. Now his organization runs the largest cleanup in history, removing millions of pounds of plastic from the Great Pacific Garbage Patch.
keywords: ocean cleanup, Boyan Slat, plastic pollution, environmental innovation, Ocean Cleanup Project
